channel.description: Password Aging attributes Can be done for an individual user or applied to all users. Can prevent users from logging in to the system by locking their access for a period of time or permanently. Must be performed by a user with elevated privileges of the root user. Normal users may be allowed access to privileged commands by defining them appropriately in a configuration file. Each file that exists on the system regardless of its type has an owning user and an owning group.
